# Izey - Web Design & SEO for Belgian Self-Employed

> Professional website creation for self-employed professionals and small businesses in Belgium.
> Bilingual service (Dutch & French). SEO included with every package. Prices from EUR 999.

## Services
- [Homepage (NL)](https://izey.dev/): Full service overview, pricing, process, FAQ
- [Homepage (FR)](https://izey.dev/fr/): French version of all services

## Key Facts
- Location: Belgium (nationwide service)
- Languages: Dutch (nl-BE), French (fr-BE)
- Pricing: One-Pager EUR 999, Multi-Page EUR 2800, Maintenance EUR 79/month (all excl. VAT)
- Delivery: 5-7 business days
- Contact: hello@izey.dev | +32 472 89 15 66 (WhatsApp)
- Specialization: Websites for hairdressers, plumbers, bakers, beauticians, and other local service providers
- SEO included with every website package
